_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Arma 3
author: red_thirten@yahoo.com
description: Dev bir askeri sandbox'ta gercek carpisma oynanisini deneyimleyin. Çok çeşitli tek ve çok oyunculu icerik, 20'den fazla araç ve 40 silah, ve sinirsiz icerik oluşturma imkani ile PC'nin onde gelen askeri oyunu. Otantik, çeşitli, açık - Arma 3 sizi savasa gonderiyor.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

## File: Pterodactyl Arma 3 Egg - egg-arma3.json
## Author: David Wolfe (Red-Thirten)
## Date: 2022/05/22
## License: MIT License
## Image to install with is 'ghcr.io/ptero-eggs/installers:debian'

# Install packages. Default packages below are skipped if using image noted above, thus speeding up the install process.
apt -y update
apt -y --no-install-recommends install curl lib32gcc-s1 ca-certificates

# Check for valid Steam credentials to download Arma 3 with (requires valid Steam account)
if [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "anonymous" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_PASS}" == "" ]]; then
    echo -e "INSTALLATION ERROR: A valid REAL Steam account is required to download the Arma 3 Dedicated Server."
    echo -e "\t(\"anonymous\" account cannot be used. Game ownership is not required.)"
    exit 1
fi

# Download and install SteamCMD
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd /mnt/server/steamapps
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

# SteamCMD fails otherwise for some reason, even running as root.
# This is changed at the end of the install process anyways.
chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

# Install game server using SteamCMD
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server "+login \"${STEAM_USER}\" \"${STEAM_PASS}\"" +app_update ${STEAMCMD_APPID} ${STEAMCMD_EXTRA_FLAGS} validate +quit

# Set up 32 and 64 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk{32,64}
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

# Arma 3 setup
cd /mnt/server/
[[ -f basic.cfg ]] || curl -sSLO ${BASIC_URL}
[[ -f server.cfg ]] || curl -sSLO ${BASIC_URL%/*}/server.cfg
chmod 644 basic.cfg server.cfg


## install end
echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: [ZORUNLU] Steam kullanıcı adı
variables.description: Kurulum ve güncellemeler için kullanılır. Account does not need to own Arma 3, but MUST BE a VALID Steam account (anonymous login cannot be used). For security reasons it is recommended that you create a new Steam account just for your dedicated servers. *This info is not visible to sunucu owner.*

variables.name: [ZORUNLU] Steam Şifresi
variables.description: Kurulum ve güncellemeler için kullanılır. Steam Guard MUST be completely TURNED OFF for install to complete successfully. *This info is not visible to sunucu owner, BUT IS stored in PLAIN TEXT. It is NOT advised to use a personal account; best to use a dummy account.*

variables.name: SteamCMD Yeniden Deneme sayısı
variables.description: How many times SteamCMD should retry downloading a server veya mod after a recoverable error. (ie. A particularly large mod like CUP veya RHS download times out)

variables.name: Sunucu Binary'si
variables.description: Server binary to call on server start. (32-bit: arma3server | 64-bit: arma3server_x64)

variables.name: Ekstra Başlangıç Parametreleri
variables.description: See https://community.bistudio.com/wiki/Arma_3_Startup_Parameters for more info on valid flags for this field. "-noLogs" is recommended to prevent console rate-limit warnings.

variables.name: Maksimum Oyuncu sayısı
variables.description: Maksimum oyuncu sayısı.allowed to join sunucu.

variables.name: Sunucu Şifresi
variables.description: Sunucuya katılmak için gerekli şifre.Şifre olmaması için bos bırakın.

variables.name: Otomatik Güncellemeler
variables.description: Quickly checks for any server veya mod updates on startup, and updates if necessary. (1 Enable | 0 Disable)

variables.name: Mod İndirme/Güncellemeleri Devre Dışı Bırak
variables.description: If the Steam account does not own the base Arma 3 game, Steam Workshop mod downloads/updates will not work. If so, this setting allows disabling of this feature to avoid errors. (1 Disable | 0 Enable)

variables.name: Yapimci DLC'lerini İndir
variables.description: Downloads/Updates all the mod files required to run any CDLC during the next Automatic Update. DLCs can be enabled by adding their mod folder name to the Additional Mods startup variable. For example, add "vn;" to load the Prairie Fire CDLC. (1 Yes | 0 No)

variables.name: Mod Listesi dosyası (A3 Launcher'dan Disa Aktarilmis)
variables.description: Filename for an exported modlist. This file will be parsed for mod installation and loading. Upload your HTML file to the root directory (eg. /home/container/modlist.html). Leave blank to disable loading mods from a modlist.

variables.name: Ek Modlar
variables.description: A semicolon-separated list of additional mod folders to load. Useful for loading CDLCs veya manually uploaded mods. This mod list will be loaded in addition to the Modlist File (if used). Any mods in this list that are in "@workshopID" form will also be included in Automatic Updates (if enabled). NO capital letters, spaces, veya folders starting with a number! (ex. myMod;vn;@123456789;@987654321;etc;)

variables.name: [Onarım] Mod dosyalarını Küçük Harf Yap
variables.description: Every mod that is set to be loaded will have its folder and files changed to lowercase (to prevent errors). It is recommended to enable this for one server boot after copying a mod from a Windows machine to sunucu, veya if mods seem to not be loading. (1 Enable | 0 Disable)

variables.name: [Onarım] Sunucu dosyalarını Doğrula
variables.description: Validates all server files when Automatic Updates is enabled. Not: This will significantly increase server startup times, so it is recommended to only enable this when needed. (1 Enable | 0 Disable)

variables.name: [Gelişmiş] Yalnızca Sunucu Tarafı Modlar
variables.description: Mod folders to be used with the "-serverMods" startup option. They only run server-side and are not required by clients if "verifySignatures" is enabled. Any mods in this list that are in "@workshopID" form will also be included in Automatic Updates (if enabled). NO capital letters, spaces, veya folders starting with a number! Each folder must be followed with a semicolon (ex. @123456789;@987654321;etc;)

variables.name: [Gelişmiş] İsteğe Bağlı İstemci Tarafı Modlar
variables.description: A semicolon-separated list of optional mods to load into the keys folder, but not include in server's mod parameter. Useful for allowing clients to connect to sunucu with veya without the mod loaded. Mods in this list must be in "@workshopID" form (ex. @123456789;@987654321;). These will also be included in Automatic Updates (if enabled).

variables.name: [Gelişmiş] SteamCMD için Ek Bayraklar
variables.description: [This will override "Download Creator DLCs" if used] Only used when checking for server updates, and typically used for grabbing beta builds. örnek: -beta profiling -betapassword CautionSpecialProfilingAndTestingBranchArma3

variables.name: [Gelişmiş] Headless Client (HC)
variables.description: Number of Headless Clients (0 - 5) to launch parallel with sunucu. Be süre to set the following "HC Connect Password" variable if your server is password locked. PLEASE Not: Using a headless client is only recommended for advanced users, adds extra overhead to your permitted server resources, and is only beneficial if a properly written, HC compliant, mission file is provided. See https://community.bistudio.com/wiki/Arma_3:_Headless_Client for more info.

variables.name: [Gelişmiş] HC Konsol Çıktılısını Gizle
variables.description: Hides Headless Client console output (except for critical errors) to prevent nonessential console spam. (1 Hide | 0 Show)

variables.name: [Gelişmiş] Başlangıçta HC Profil Önbelleğini Temizle
variables.description: Deletes all profiles from the "/home/container/serverprofile/home" directory on startup, except for sunucu's main "Player" profile. Recommended to enable when running HCs, because the profiles are generally unused and can cause HCs to crash if they develop errors. (1 Enable | 0 Disable)

variables.name: [Gelişmiş] Arma 3 Adanmış Sunucu Uygulama ID
variables.description: Kurulum ve güncellemeler için kullanılır. Rarely needs to be changed.

variables.name: [Gelişmiş] basic.cfg URL
variables.description: URL to a valid Arma 3 basic.cfg file. The "Basic" configuration file is used during server runtime for advanced network performance tuning. Because it is a required file, this URL is used to download it during installation, veya if the file is found missing during startup.
